cleavage agent: the sample was digested with trypsin prepared in 25 mm ABC at 37 °C overnight
collision energy: Fragmentation was performed with normalized collision energy of 35%
fragmentation method: the 15 most intense ions were sequentially isolated for higher-energy collisional dissociation (HCD) MS/MS fragmentation
instrument: connected to the Orbitrap Elite hybrid mass spectrometer
ionization type: an electrospray ionization (ESI) source of quadrupole time-of-flight mass spectrometer
labeling: The iTRAQ method allowed for multiplexing of different samples in the same run by MS analysis
reduction reagent: 1 mm DTT before resuspending in 1.6 ml 20% (w/v) sucrose solution
reduction concentration: 1 mm DTT before resuspending in 1.6 ml 20% (w/v) sucrose solution
